compiled_state.title: Update CLI reference docs for duplicates and supersedes relations
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What to do
Update `plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md` to document the new `duplicates` and `supersedes` relation values in the `ticket link` subcommand section.

Add:
- Relation value table entry for `duplicates`: "source is the duplicate ticket, target is the canonical ticket; not bidirectional; no blocking semantics"
- Relation value table entry for `supersedes`: "source replaces/supersedes the target; not bidirectional; no blocking semantics"
- Example invocations for both

## Files to modify
- `plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md` — update ticket link documentation

## Acceptance criteria
- CLI reference shows `duplicates` and `supersedes` in the relation table
- Directional semantics are documented
- No bidirectionality for either new relation
- Doc update does not require a test (doc-only change)

## Testing mode
UPDATE — documentation only, no behavioral change
